name: Red raspberry (food medium)
description: Food-derived medium: metabolizable components of Red raspberry (Rubus idaeus) [Fruits] from FooDB, plus a standard M9 mineral base. Organic components use presence-based uptake bounds; FooDB content retained. Measured compounds with no BiGG exchange are listed under uncovered.

provenance.citation: FooDB v2020-04-07 (Wishart DS et al., foodb.ca). Content sources: DUKE, MANUAL, PHENOL EXPLORER, S.Hakkinen, M. Heinonen, S. Karenlampi, H. Mykkanen, J. Ruuskanen, R. Torronen. Screening of selected flavonoids and phenolic acids in 19 berries. Food Research International 32 (1999) 345-353. https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S0963996999000952, USDA.
provenance.notes: Organic components mapped from FooDB compounds to BiGG via InChIKey/name. Mineral base added. Bounds presence-based; foodb_content retained. Unmapped measured compounds kept in uncovered (v2 completeness fix). IMPORTANT: composition values are taken from the archived FooDB 2020-04-07 CSV data release; FooDB's live food page no longer displays this bulk composition, so it will appear empty. Verify individual compounds via the per-component cross-reference links. Underlying content was aggregated by FooDB from USDA / DTU / Phenol Explorer.
